Current baseline: Phases 0-6, 8, and 9; Phase 7 deferred

Vecells Integration Constellation Board

The ranking separates families that must be simulated immediately from those that should be acquired live later, while keeping proof, ambiguity, fallback, and control-plane law intact.

withheld Phase 0 entry verdict carried from seq_020
0 integration families in the ranked model
0 source dependency rows collapsed from seq_008
0 mock-vs-live divergences recorded explicitly

Filters

Use the rail to compare current mock urgency against later live-provider urgency. The board is read-only by design.

Quadrant

X-axis: live acquisition friction. Y-axis: MVP and control-plane necessity.

Integration_Constellation_Board
Live acquisition friction
MVP / control-plane necessity
Integration Lane Mock rank Live rank Friction Necessity

Swimlanes

The lane board stays read-only so the chosen lane law is reviewable rather than ad hoc editable.

mock_now

Families that need simulator-grade execution immediately.

hybrid

Families that need both a real simulator now and early live-provider prep.

actual_later

Families where strategy and gating matter more than immediate simulator depth.

deferred

Inventoried, bounded, and deliberately kept out of current-baseline blocking posture.

Divergence register

Rows where the current mock urgency and later live urgency intentionally diverge.

Integration Class Mock rank Live rank Later tasks

Later-task linkage

Tasks 022-040 grouped by the families they now influence.

Task Group Integrations Lanes

Top risks

The board surfaces the highest-risk rows linked to the currently visible integration set.

Inspector

Select a node, table row, or lane card to inspect the rationale, proof bar, and readiness gates.

Select an integration family.
